mk8_flip_key.summary: Verified foundation record for UK Fiesta Mk8 / CE1 with remote flip key.
verified_notes: Ford documents a remote flip-key configuration.
The key blade is used to start this configuration.
The vehicle uses Ford's Passive Anti-Theft System terminology.
warnings: Transponder, frequency, blade profile and aftermarket programming coverage remain unverified.
Do not use unverified values for ordering or programming a customer key.

mk8_passive_key.summary: Verified foundation record for UK Fiesta Mk8 / CE1 with passive key and push-button start.
verified_notes: The passive key contains a removable emergency blade.
The key must be inside the vehicle to switch on the ignition and start the engine.
The backup position is beneath a rubber mat and the key is placed buttons-up.
The backup position can be used when the key battery is flat or frequencies are jammed.
warnings: Transponder, frequency, blade profile and aftermarket programming coverage remain unverified.
Do not use unverified values for ordering or programming a customer key.

ford_fiesta_2017_2023_support.title: Fiesta (2017) owner manuals and vehicle support pages
scope: Ford UK identifies the generation as Fiesta (2017)
owner manuals are published for later model years including 2022
